name: infomind-project-starter
description: 인포마인드 UX 프로젝트 스타터 킷 — KRDS + Tailwind v4 + BEM

scripts.build: npm run build:tokens && npm run build:css
scripts.check:pages: node ./scripts/check-violations.js main.html sub.html sub2.html sub2-2.html sub2-3.html sub3.html sub4.html sub5.html sub6.html sub7.html sub8.html && node ./scripts/check-html-structure.js main.html sub.html sub2.html sub2-2.html sub2-3.html sub3.html sub4.html sub5.html sub6.html sub7.html sub8.html
